title.en: The Lord of the Pathless They congratulated one...

content.en:
"Congratulations to the Lord of Endless, with your current strength, I'm afraid you're at the top of the Realm!"

The Lord of the Pathless They congratulated one after another.

Soon, they were back at the Pathless Tower.

At this time, Ye Tian took out some resources, including some Extreme Dao Monuments, which were all duplicated Extreme Dao Monuments that Ye Tian did not need, as well as some fragments of Extreme Dao Monuments.

Moreover, Ye Tian also took out a lot of resources, all of which were enough resources that the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, that is, the original ancestor, could not ignore.

"Lord of Endless, where did you get so many Extreme Dao Monuments and resources?"

The Endless Lord was shocked.

The key is that Ye Tian obtained so many resources and gave them to the Wudao Tower.

"It's a resource obtained from the Ten Directions Black Domain!"

Ye Tian explained.

"Ten Directions Black Domain, where is this?"

The Lord of the Daoless Ways is so confused that they haven't heard of it at all!

Ye Tian explained: "The Ten Directions Black Domain is a place of the same grade as the end of the realm, it is a primordial domain, and the place where the end of the realm and the extreme deep sea are located is a primordial domain. "

"What, beyond the end of the world, there is an equivalent heaven and earth, how did you find it?"

The Lord of the Dao, they were extremely shocked.

Immediately, Ye Tian said about his tracking of the Lord of the Northern Underworld.

The Lord of the Ancient was surprised: "Lord of Endless, you are following the Lord of the Northern Underworld, and he didn't find out?"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "I have comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao, the Lord of the Northern Hell naturally can't find me, and after entering the Ten Directions Black Domain, I secretly collected a large number of resources, and they can't stay in the Ten Directions Black Domain for a long time, they have to leave every once in a while, but I can stay there all the time, so many good things in the Ten Directions Black Domain have been scraped by me." If it hadn't been discovered by the Unbounded Lord, maybe I would have just scraped it up!"

"Envy you for having access to the Primordial Black Sea!"

The Lord of the Sword Pole said.

The Lord of Canggu said: "The Extreme Dao True River has the support of the Unbounded Lord, it is really lucky, otherwise, the Extreme Dao True River will not be able to become the first eternal heaven and earth." "

"The Lord of the Unbounded is born in the Extreme Dao True River, and people will naturally help the Extreme Dao True River, so even if the Ten Directions Black Domain is discovered, it will be left to the Extreme Dao True River! The Lord of the Pathless said.

Ye Tian understands the Lord of the Boundless very well, just like he is a human race, and many good things he also left to the human race.

Even if the Terran doesn't have any strong people yet, he will keep those treasures as the foundation of the Terran, and he is reluctant to give them all to the Wudao Tower.

In the future, if the Origin Realm Sea develops, he will also vigorously cultivate the Origin Realm Sea, and incidentally cultivate the Daoless Tower.

As for the Eternal Ruins, he won't take care of them!

And the Lord of the Boundless also thinks like this, so he won't help the cultivators of the other Eternal Heaven and Earth.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's great potential and helping the Unbounded Lord in the future, otherwise the Unbounded Lord wouldn't be so polite to him.

After Ye Tian left some resources in the Wudao Pagoda, he continued to practice in retreat.

Although he became a Primordial Ancestor, his cultivation had not yet reached his current limit, so he began to use a large amount of resources to improve his cultivation, and the Extreme Dao Will and the Primordial Ancestor's body became stronger and stronger.

Of course, it is not so easy to raise the cultivation level to the limit of a primordial ancestor, and it takes a long time to complete the resources and time.

If he hadn't found enough resources in the Ten Directions Black Domain this time, he wouldn't have enough resources to raise his cultivation to the limit of a Primordial Ancestor.

When he was improving his cultivation, Ye Tian was also contemplating the Extreme Dao, and he still had many Extreme Dao in the entry realm, and he still needed to ascend to the consummation realm.

Only when thousands of Extreme Paths have been raised to the Perfection Realm, and many Extreme Paths have been raised to the Extreme Realm, can his Endless Extreme Path have any hope of becoming the Extreme Realm in the future!

Time flies, and hundreds of billions of eternal years have passed.

Ye Tian almost exhausted most of the resources in his body, and only then did he raise his cultivation to the limit realm of a single ancestor.

Just after his cultivation reached the extreme realm, the extreme space-time extreme path echoed with the body of the original ancestor, as if breaking some kind of shackles, and the endless energy of the primordial black sea poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him step into the realm of the dual ancestor.

"It turns out that this is to break through to the realm of the Double Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

A long time has passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation has completely stabilized in the realm of the double ancestor.

The Dual Origin Ancestor was much stronger than the First Origin Ancestor, and Ye Tian had comprehended so many extreme extreme paths, his current strength was no less than that of the weaker Triple Origin Ancestor.

Of course, he was still far from the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and he had to first raise his cultivation to the limit of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and then engrave the Extreme Path on the Will Pagoda.

this day.

A piece of news came to Ye Tian, and another Eternal Heaven and Earth Black Fang Land at the end of the realm was going to attract the energy of the primordial Black Sea into the Black Fang Land, so as to transform the Black Fang Land.

Obviously, the Land of Black Fang was traded with the Extreme Dao True River, and it took a lot of money to buy the method of arranging the magic circle from the Extreme Dao True River.

But this time, Ye Tian was not interested in helping, anyway, there were so many pseudo-ancestors at the end of the realm, and there was no shortage of him.

As the years passed, other eternal lands continued to build circles to channel the energy of the primordial Black Sea.

And on this day, the many pseudo-ancestors of the Eternal Ruins discussed it, and also decided to negotiate with several original ancestors such as the Lord of the Golden Body and the Lord of the White Night of the Extreme True River to obtain the method of arranging the magic circle.

Ye Tian was not involved, but he knew about it.

After that, the nine top forces of the Eternal Ruins all paid a great price to purchase the method of the circle arrangement, and then began to spend countless resources to start arranging.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also went to help.

It can be said that this arrangement has made the major forces of the Eternal Ruins poor.

However, in the end, the Eternal Ruins attracted the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, allowing the Eternal Ruins to transform and give birth to the power of the Extreme Dao, and some Extreme Dao resources will be born one after another in the future.

In the long run, they will naturally earn!

Extreme deep sea.

Ye Tian's Golden-winged Peng Bird's copy body had also grown to the realm of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, that is, the First Ancestor, and since he had not spent resources to improve the cultivation of this body, he could not become a Dual Ancestor for the time being.

Ye Tian originally wanted to give up this replica body, but now that he had mixed into the upper echelons of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea and entered the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, it would be a pity to give up like this.

Moreover, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to occupy the quota of the copy body for the time being, so this copy body stayed here all the time.

this day.

After Ye Tian revealed that he had comprehended the Golden Extreme Path, he finally entered the core layer of the Extreme Path Deep Sea Palace, and learned a big secret on the side of the Extreme Path Deep Sea.

Knowing this secret, Ye Tian was really shocked.

Because of this secret, the Lord of the Boundless Realm may not even know it!
